normalization_rules.excluding_orth: Run raw extraction and drop ERRANT edits whose type contains ORTH before alignment.
normalization_rules.excluding_orth_punct: Run raw extraction and drop ERRANT edits whose type contains ORTH or PUNCT before alignment.
normalization_rules.excluding_punct: Run raw extraction and drop ERRANT edits whose type contains PUNCT before alignment.
normalization_rules.normalized_case: Apply punctuation normalization and lowercase source, reference, and prediction to isolate case-only effects.
normalization_rules.normalized_punctuation: Apply spacing normalization plus quote/apostrophe and contraction tokenization to the T5 prediction only.
normalization_rules.normalized_spacing: Normalize whitespace and punctuation spacing in the T5 prediction only.
normalization_rules.raw: Use original T5 predictions without modifying source, reference, or prediction.
normalization_rules.substantive_grammatical_edits_only: Drop ORTH/PUNCT and punctuation/case-only edits before alignment; keep likely grammatical edits.
